segments.text: Does not wisdom call out, and understanding raise her voice?
On the heights overlooking the road, at the crossroads she takes her st and.
Beside the gates to the city, at the entrances she cries out:
To you, O men, I call out, and my cry is to the sons of men.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: O simple ones, learn to be shrewd; O fools, gain understanding.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Listen, for I speak of noble things, and the opening of my lips will reveal right.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For my mouth will speak the truth, and wickedness is detestable to my lips.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: All the words of my mouth are righteous; none are crooked or perverse.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: They are all plain to the discerning, and upright to those who find knowledge.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Receive my instruction instead of silver, and knowledge rather than pure gold.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For wisdom is more precious than rubies, and nothing you desire compares with her.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I, wisdom, dwell together with prudence, and I find knowledge and discretion.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: To fear the LORD is to hate evil; I hate arrogant pride, evil conduct, and perverse speech.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Counsel and sound judgment are mine; I have insight and strength.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: By me kings reign, and rulers enact just laws;
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: By me princes rule, and all nobles who govern justly.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I love those who love me, and those who seek me early shall find me.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: With me are riches and honor, enduring wealth and righteousness.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: My fruit is better than gold, pure gold, and my harvest surpasses choice silver.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I walk in the way of righteousness, along the paths of justice,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: bestowing wealth on those who love me and making their treasuries full.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: The LORD created me as His first course, before His works of old.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: From everlasting I was established, from the beginning, before the earth began.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: When there were no watery depths, I was brought forth, when no springs were overflowing with water.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Before the mountains were settled, before the hills, I was brought forth,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: before He made the land or fields, or any of the dust of the earth.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I was there when He established the heavens, when He inscribed a circle on the face of the deep,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: when He established the clouds above, when the fountains of the deep gushed forth,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text:
when He set a boundary for the sea, so that the waters would not surpass His command,
when He marked out the foundations of the earth.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text:
Then I was a skilled craftsman at His side, and His delight day by day,
rejoicing always in His presence.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I was rejoicing in His whole world, delighting together in the sons of men.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Now therefore, my sons, listen to me, for blessed are those who keep my ways.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Listen to instruction and be wise; do not ignore it.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text:
Blessed is the man who listens to me, watching daily at my doors,
waiting at the posts of my doorway.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For whoever finds me finds life and obtains the favor of the LORD.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: But he who fails to find me harms himself; all who hate me love death.
segments.speaker: Wisdom
